data.en: Where did Yaming go on vacation?
data.cn: 亚明去哪里度假了？
data.hint: where引导特殊疑问句，用过去时did

data.en: He went to Mount Huangshan with his family.
data.cn: 他和家人去了黄山。
data.hint: went to表示“去某地”，with表示“和……一起”
accept: With his family, he went to Mount Huangshan.

data.en: Did she do anything interesting during the summer holidays?
data.cn: 暑假期间她做了什么有趣的事吗？
data.hint: did助动词，anything修饰不定代词形容词后置

data.en: She visited some ancient buildings near Seattle.
data.cn: 她参观了西雅图附近的一些古老建筑。
data.hint: visited动词过去式，near表示“在……附近”

data.en: She stayed with her grandparents for ten days.
data.cn: 她和祖父母住了十天。
data.hint: stayed with与……住在一起，for接时间段
accept: For ten days, she stayed with her grandparents.

data.en: The landscape there was amazing.
data.cn: 那里的风景太棒了。
data.hint: landscape风景，was amazing作表语
accept: There the landscape was amazing.

data.en: Everyone said they wanted to go again.
data.cn: 大家都说他们想再去一次。
data.hint: said后面接省略that的宾语从句，want to do

data.en: How was your summer holiday?
data.cn: 你的暑假怎么样？
data.hint: how引导疑问句询问情况，用过去时was

data.en: It was relaxing and fun.
data.cn: 它既轻松又好玩。
data.hint: relaxing形容词表示令人放松的
accept: It was fun and relaxing.

data.en: Did you go anywhere interesting?
data.cn: 你去了什么有趣的地方吗？
data.hint: anywhere用于疑问句，形容词interesting后置

data.en: We stayed in the old town for a few days.
data.cn: 我们在古镇住了几天。
data.hint: stayed in住在，for a few days住几天
accept: For a few days, we stayed in the old town.

data.en: Did you visit Yulong Mountain?
data.cn: 你参观玉龙雪山了吗？
data.hint: did开头的一般过去时疑问句，后面动词原形

data.en: Everyone says Lijiang is beautiful.
data.cn: 大家都说丽江很美。
data.hint: everyone是单三，主句一般现在时，宾语从句

data.en: It just took my breath away.
data.cn: 它简直令人叹为观止。
data.hint: take sb's breath away令人惊叹

data.en: We took a lot of great photos there.
data.cn: 我们在那里拍了许多好看的照片。
data.hint: take photos拍照，a lot of许多
accept: There we took a lot of great photos.
We took a lot of great photos there.

data.en: Did you eat anything special?
data.cn: 你吃什么特别的东西了吗？
data.hint: anything special不定代词修饰后置，一般疑问句用did

data.en: Everything tasted good, especially the steamed chicken soup.
data.cn: 一切都尝起来很好，尤其是汽锅鸡。
data.hint: tasted系动词接形容词，especially起强调作用

data.en: I stayed at home to read, play games, and relax.
data.cn: 我待在家里看书、玩游戏和放松。
data.hint: to read不定式表目的，并列成分用逗号隔开
accept: I stayed at home to play games, read, and relax.
I stayed at home to relax, read, and play games.

data.en: We had a wonderful experience.
data.cn: 我们有了一次美妙的经历。
data.hint: had过去式，wonderful修饰experience

data.en: I got you a silk scarf.
data.cn: 我给你带了一条丝绸围巾。
data.hint: get sb sth给某人带某物，got是过去式
accept: I got a silk scarf for you.

data.en: I didn't go anywhere special, but I tried something new.
data.cn: 我没去什么特别的地方，但我尝试了一些新事物。
data.hint: didn't后接动词原形，anywhere/something形容词后置

data.en: I worked as a tour guide at a museum.
data.cn: 我在一家博物馆当导游。
data.hint: worked as作为……工作，at a museum在博物馆

data.en: Did you go with anyone?
data.cn: 你和谁一起去的吗？
data.hint: go with sb和某人一起去，anyone用于疑问句

data.en: Like everyone else, I was ready to go on a holiday somewhere.
data.cn: 像其他人一样，我准备好去某个地方度假了。
data.hint: be ready to do sth准备好做某事，somewhere副词

data.en: No one could join me, so I went by myself.
data.cn: 没人能陪我，所以我自己去了。
data.hint: no one做主语，by myself独立地、独自地
accept: Since no one could join me, I went by myself.
I went by myself so no one could join me.

data.en: I could do nothing but stay in the hotel.
data.cn: 我除了待在旅馆里什么也做不了。
data.hint: could do nothing but do sth除了……之外什么也不能做

data.en: The hotel was nice, with a comfortable bed.
data.cn: 旅馆很好，有一张舒服的床。
data.hint: with表示“具有，带有”作伴随状语

data.en: I felt bored, so I decided to look for something to read.
data.cn: 我感到很无聊，所以我决定找点东西读。
data.hint: felt bored感到厌倦，decide to do决定做

data.en: I heard someone shout from outside.
data.cn: 我听到外面有人在喊。
data.hint: hear sb do sth听到某人做某事，shout用原形

data.en: There was a beautiful double rainbow in the sky.
data.cn: 天空中出现了一道美丽的双彩虹。
data.hint: there was表示“有”，in the sky在天空
accept: In the sky there was a beautiful double rainbow.

data.en: The weather was fine and everyone felt excited.
data.cn: 天气晴朗，大家都感到很兴奋。
data.hint: felt excited感到兴奋，excited形容词作表语
accept: Everyone felt excited and the weather was fine.

data.en: The Russian people built this museum to remember their fight.
data.cn: 俄罗斯人民建造这座博物馆是为了纪念他们的斗争。
data.hint: built过去式，to remember动词不定式表目的
accept: To remember their fight, the Russian people built this museum.

data.en: The tour guide told us stories about the war.
data.cn: 导游给我们讲了关于战争的故事。
data.hint: tell sb sth告诉某人某事，about关于
accept: The tour guide told stories about the war to us.

data.en: War is terrible and peace does not come easily.
data.cn: 战争是可怕的，和平来之不易。
data.hint: easily副词修饰动词come
accept: Peace does not come easily and war is terrible.

data.en: We should not forget that.
data.cn: 我们不应该忘记那个。
data.hint: should情态动词接not和动词原形

data.en: I ate a lot of ice cream at a restaurant near the park.
data.cn: 我在公园附近的一家餐馆吃了许多冰淇淋。
data.hint: ate过去式，at a restaurant在餐馆，near在附近
accept: At a restaurant near the park, I ate a lot of ice cream.

data.en: During dinner, I didn't feel like eating because I felt sick.
data.cn: 晚餐时我不想吃，因为我觉得不舒服。
data.hint: feel like doing sth想要做某事，sick形容词作表语
accept: I didn't feel like eating during dinner because I felt sick.
Because I felt sick, I didn't feel like eating during dinner.

data.en: This morning the air was fresh and cool.
data.cn: 今天早晨空气新鲜凉爽。
data.hint: the air was fresh and cool空气新鲜凉爽
accept: The air was fresh and cool this morning.
This morning the air was cool and fresh.

data.en: The metro stations are really beautiful.
data.cn: 地铁站真的很美。
data.hint: stations复数主语，are作系动词

data.en: Sometimes I felt like I was walking inside a palace.
data.cn: 有时我觉得自己仿佛在宫殿里散步。
data.hint: felt like...觉得好像，was walking过去进行时
accept: I felt like I was walking inside a palace sometimes.

data.en: We played games and soon became friends.
data.cn: 我们玩了游戏，很快就成了朋友。
data.hint: played和became是并列的过去式谓语，become friends成为朋友

data.en: Soon everyone got together to sing and dance.
data.cn: 很快大家就聚在一起唱歌跳舞。
data.hint: got together聚在一起，to sing and dance不定式表目的
accept: Everyone got together to sing and dance soon.
Soon everyone got together to dance and sing.

data.en: My family took a train to Scotland for a holiday.
data.cn: 我们全家坐火车去苏格兰度假。
data.hint: take a train to坐火车去，for a holiday度假
accept: For a holiday, my family took a train to Scotland.

data.en: We stayed in a comfortable house in the countryside.
data.cn: 我们住在乡下一栋舒服的房子里。
data.hint: stayed in住在，in the countryside在乡村
accept: In the countryside, we stayed in a comfortable house.

data.en: Beside the house, there was a huge forest.
data.cn: 房子旁边有一片茂密的森林。
data.hint: beside在……旁边，there was表示过去存在
accept: There was a huge forest beside the house.

data.en: I turned around and was surprised to see a deer.
data.cn: 我转过身，惊讶地看到一只鹿。
data.hint: be surprised to do sth对做某事感到惊讶

data.en: The deer is probably looking for food.
data.cn: 这只鹿可能在寻找食物。
data.hint: is looking for现在进行时寻找，probably副词

data.en: I decided to do something cool.
data.cn: 我决定做点酷的事。
data.hint: decide to do sth决定做某事，something cool形容词后置

data.en: I packed everything I needed and started the trip.
data.cn: 我收拾好所有需要的东西，开始了旅程。
data.hint: everything I needed我需要的一切（定语从句）
accept: I started the trip and packed everything I needed.

data.en: Every day, I went scuba diving with a guide.
data.cn: 每天我都和一个导游去潜水。
data.hint: go scuba diving去潜水，with a guide和导游一起
accept: I went scuba diving with a guide every day.
